hooks.command: bash -c 'GCD=$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$GCD" != /* ]] && [[ ! "$GCD" =~ ^[A-Za-z]:/ ]]; then GCD="$PWD/$GCD"; fi; ROOT=$(dirname "$GCD"); bash "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/pre-tool-use.sh"'

bash -c 'GCD=$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$GCD" != /* ]] && [[ ! "$GCD" =~ ^[A-Za-z]:/ ]]; then GCD="$PWD/$GCD"; fi; ROOT=$(dirname "$GCD"); bash "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/pre-tool-use.sh"'

bash -c 'if echo "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT:-}" | grep -q "bun test"; then GCD=$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$GCD" != /* ]] && [[ ! "$GCD" =~ ^[A-Za-z]:/ ]]; then GCD="$PWD/$GCD"; fi; ROOT=$(dirname "$GCD"); cd "$ROOT" && bun install; fi'

bash -c 'GCD=$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$GCD" != /* ]] && [[ ! "$GCD" =~ ^[A-Za-z]:/ ]]; then GCD="$PWD/$GCD"; fi; ROOT=$(dirname "$GCD"); bash "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/inject-context.sh"'

bash -c 'mkdir -p docs; if [ ! -f docs/session-state.md ]; then cat > docs/session-state.md << "EOF"
# Session State
_Atualizado pelo Claude antes de cada notificação ntfy._

## Contexto Ativo
- **Story:** --
- **Task:** --
- **Fase TDD:** Red | Green | Refactor

## Último Passo Executado
--

## Próximo Passo Esperado
--

## Questões Abertas
--

## Agentes Envolvidos
--
EOF
echo "docs/session-state.md criado. Preencha as seções antes de enviar notificação ntfy."; fi'

bash -c 'GCD=$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$GCD" != /* ]] && [[ ! "$GCD" =~ ^[A-Za-z]:/ ]]; then GCD="$PWD/$GCD"; fi; ROOT=$(dirname "$GCD"); bash "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/post-tool-use.sh"'
